message:
Add test coverage for iter_active method in GraphemePool

New tests:
- test_iter_active_empty_pool: Verifies empty iterator for new pool
- test_iter_active_all_entries: Verifies iteration over all allocated graphemes
- test_iter_active_skips_freed: Verifies freed slots are excluded from iteration

Tests verify both ID presence and grapheme content correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
